seo.metaDescription: A fully automated, compliance-assured platform for foreign VAT recovery and domestic VAT obligations. Create real added value for your company.

hero.title: Monetizing VAT Reclaim and Compliance for Business Customers
hero.description: Foreign business expenses (travel, trade shows, services) are increasing, while many recoverable VAT amounts and domestic VAT obligations remain inefficiently managed. Complex regulations, varying country requirements, documentation challenges, compliance risks, and manual processes make VAT recovery and VAT compliance a significant burden.
hero.solutionText: Our Solution: Elevating customer value and generating passive revenue through a fully automated, compliance-assured platform for B2B VAT recovery and domestic VAT compliance — enabling businesses to reclaim foreign VAT and meet national VAT obligations effortlessly.

processSteps.title: Processing
processSteps.description: The VATGenius Engine automatically analyzes documents and transactions, calculates VAT amounts, and enables both foreign VAT recovery and domestic VAT compliance.

processSteps.title: Filing
processSteps.description: The VATGenius TAX API automates VAT refunds and domestic VAT filings with the relevant tax authorities.

processSteps.title: Pay-Out
processSteps.description: Funds are received and disbursed seamlessly, directly impacting VAT results across both foreign VAT recovery and domestic VAT compliance.

items.title: No Effort
items.description: Fully automated identification of refundable VAT and national VAT compliance obligations.

items.title: Maximum Amount
items.description: AI-supported verification maximizes VAT refunds while ensuring seamless compliance with national VAT obligations.

items.title: Complete Transparency
items.description: Access the status of your VAT refunds and domestic VAT obligations at any time via the dashboard.

compliance.title: Compliance & Security: Trust Built on Regulatory Excellence
compliance.description: As a partner to the financial sector, we understand that trust, security, and uncompromising regulatory compliance are non-negotiable. Our solutions are designed to simplify both foreign VAT recovery and the fulfillment of domestic VAT obligations, mitigating risk while ensuring full compliance for your institution and your business customers.

items.label: Dedicated Expertise:
items.text: International tax specialists managing all relevant VAT regulations for cross-border refunds and domestic VAT compliance.

items.label: Risk Transfer:
items.text: Offload the entire VAT compliance burden to us.

items.label: Audit Readiness:
items.text: Fully auditable and defensible VAT claims and filings.

items.label: Zero-Trust Architecture:
items.text: AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.2+ in transit

items.label: Data Minimization:
items.text: Only necessary data processed per GDPR

secureApi.title: Secure API and Infrastructure
secureApi.description: Our integration is designed to integrate seamlessly without compromising your existing security posture.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: See how VATGenius can help your business customers recover foreign VAT and manage their VAT obligations worldwide.
cta.buttonText: Request a Live Demo & Partnership Consultation
